summary:
DIGITAL CURRENCY TRANSFORMATION: Brandon describes a divine vision in which an American flag morphs into a hundred-dollar bill before transforming into a moving, living digital internet math code. God revealed to Brandon that the United States dollar is on the verge of becoming a completely digital currency. Furthermore, Brandon warns that this new digital dollar will suffer a severe and immediate devaluation, losing exactly half of its current purchasing power, meaning a hundred-dollar bill will immediately be reduced to the value of fifty dollars.

BANKING COLLAPSE AND DEBT JUBILEE: Following the currency shift, Brandon recounts a prophecy detailing a massive, systemic banking collapse. He explains that financial institutions will go bankrupt and subsequently seize all deposited funds. Regardless of whether a person is extremely wealthy or impoverished, all personal money held in accounts will be confiscated and become the sole property of the banks. However, alongside this total asset seizure, Brandon foresees a widespread debt jubilee. Because the crashed dollar will make mass foreclosures on homes and vehicles logistically impossible, banks will simply wipe out all existing consumer debts to facilitate the forced transition onto the new digital economic platform.

SUDDEN RETAIL SHORTAGES AND PANIC: The prophetic visions experienced by Brandon also include severe, overnight disruptions to the food supply and the retail sector. Brandon saw single-file lines of people stretching for a mile outside major stores like Target and Walmart, desperately waiting to acquire whatever scarce food and products remained on the mostly empty shelves. Notably, Brandon observed that the people in these massive lines were still wearing nice clothing rather than the garments of poverty. This detail indicates that the catastrophic economic crash will happen practically overnight, catching comfortable, ordinary citizens completely by surprise.

GLOBAL ASSETS AND CURRENCY INSTABILITY: In addition to the domestic crises in America, Brandon received foresight regarding global financial instruments and foreign economies. Brandon notes that specific cryptocurrencies, along with precious metals like gold and silver, will experience significant upward shifts in value as a result of the crash. Furthermore, as a specific prophetic sign given to him for the year 2023, Brandon warns that the Euro will face severe instability as a direct result of ongoing geopolitical conflicts and war in Europe. Brandon views this European turmoil as the initial falling domino that will trigger the broader global economic collapse.

PROPHETIC TIMING AND MANIFESTATION DELAYS: Concluding his message, Brandon reflects on the precise timing of his visions, admitting that he sometimes struggles to predict exactly when these events will occur due to a spiritual lack of depth perception, meaning visions can manifest immediately or years down the line. To illustrate this, Brandon shares a personal anecdote from 2018 when God warned him about severe future shortages and massive price increases for chickens and eggs. Acting in faith, Brandon immediately purchased twenty chickens. When several years passed—even enduring through the global pandemic—without the predicted shortage, he apologized to his wife, assuming he had completely misinterpreted the message. However, the exact egg and chicken crisis Brandon predicted finally manifested in 2023, proving to him that these divine warnings are highly accurate even if they take four or five years to fully materialize. Brandon emphasizes that the impending economic events are extremely serious and urges his audience to recognize that the recent shortages are only the very beginning of what is to come.
rawData: [June 30, 2023]-[The Lord showed me the dollar crash and banking crash and a new digital platform]-[https://youtu.be/wUNztkdwhXE]-[The Lord showed me an American flag, and the American flag was transformed into a hundred-dollar bill. The hundred-dollar bill was waving in the wind, and all of a sudden, it started to transform into some kind of digital code—almost like crypto code. The crypto was all moving and alive; it was all kind of like an internet math code, moving and moving. I said, "Lord, what is this?" and the Lord said, "The dollar is about to turn into a digital dollar." He said it will be worth half of what it's worth right now, so a hundred-dollar bill would be worth fifty dollars. He showed me the banks went bankrupt. All the money that was in the banks—every person that had money in there, no matter if you were really rich or if you were poor—whatever was in the banks, they seized it. All the money was now property of the bank somehow. I don't know how they did it, but all the loans that you have on your house and on your cars and everything, I saw that they would call it a debt jubilee. Because they couldn't foreclose and take everyone's houses and cars because of the dollar crashing, they just wiped it out and created a new platform; they created a new digital dollar with this. Then the Lord showed me lines of people standing at Target and Walmart trying to get food, but they weren't dressed in poverty-looking clothes; they still had nice clothes on. It happened so suddenly; it was like an overnight deal. People were in lines at Target and Walmart for a mile long because there were no products and there was no food; there was hardly anything in these stores, and people were waiting just to get whatever they could get. I could see them all in a single-file line, and it stretched forever. He showed me certain cryptocurrencies that would go up in value, he showed me certain things that would happen with gold and silver, and he showed me that for this year, he talked to me about the Euro. He told me the Euro would be in trouble because of what was going on with Europe and this war. That was one of the words that he gave me when I was praying about 2023; that was one of the first signs that this was all going to happen like dominoes. So I just simply wanted to come on and tell everybody: the things that are fixing to start to happen are very serious. I want to say this too—I mistime sometimes. Whenever I am seeing and I am praying and the Lord's showing me things that are coming, there is like a depth perception. Sometimes it comes really quick, and sometimes he is showing me years in advance, and I don't know. So I just have to keep praying over it. It's like this: in 2018, he showed me that there was something going to happen with the chickens. He said the chickens were going to become very expensive and that the eggs were going to become hard to get. It would be very expensive for some eggs compared to what they usually were. So I ran out and bought 20 chickens, trying to make sure that I had enough chickens because of what he told me, acting on the word that he gave me, and that was in 2018. So all the years went by and nothing happened. The next year went by, and nothing. And here we are; it went all the way through the pandemic, and nothing. I thought, "Man, I really had missed this; this is really flaky." I felt bad. I had to apologize to my wife and I said, "I'm sorry, honey, I missed it." I bought all those chickens, and the Lord showed me. I guess that was averted; we prayed it away or something. And then here it is, 2023, and all the stuff about chickens. I believe we're just at the beginning of that. I believe there'll be more to it, maybe with the chickens. Whatever the Lord shows me, like I said, sometimes it's four or five years before it manifests. That being said, I just wanted to let you all know that. Thank you.]
